title: mentha suaveolens var. glabrescens
intro: Mentha suaveolens var. glabrescens, also known as Apple Mint, is a variant of the mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Apple Mint include alleviating nausea and indigestion, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or added to skincare products for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
